dominant_evidence: algorithmic novelty, modeling framework, mechanism-level contribution
decision_rule: assign when methodological novelty is central and application context is secondary

dominant_evidence: domain-adapted architecture or technical integration for specific classes of tasks
decision_rule: assign when method innovation and domain adaptation are both central

dominant_evidence: task-centric framing, deployment outcomes, domain-specific evaluation context
decision_rule: assign when application scenario dominates and methods are used mainly as tools
